title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at IndiGo

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at IndiGo
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, IndiGo in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About IndiGo:
IndiGo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
